field_values.action_summary: The group arrives at the massive city of Thark. Due to their status, they are separated; John Carter is assigned quarters in a large building near the central plaza, while Dejah Thoris remains under Thark supervision.
field_values.emotional_beat: Awe (at the city) $\rightarrow$ Isolation/Dread (due to separation).
location_requirements: massive architecture of the city of Thark
field_values.camera_intent: Grand establishing shots of Thark architecture; Medium shots of the group being processed/separated; POV shots of the scale of the city
movement_notes: Scale of the environment relative to characters
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH016_SC002

## Production Intent
The production must emphasize the overwhelming scale of Thark's massive architecture to facilitate a transition from awe to isolation. Visual storytelling should focus on the physical processing and separation of the protagonists, utilizing the grand environment to dwarf the characters as they are divided by status.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- dejah_thoris
- sola
- Thark guards/officials

## Required Environments
- The grand massive architecture of the city of Thark
- Central Plaza
- John's new quarters

## Continuity Constraints
- Scale of the environment relative to characters must remain consistent across establishing and medium shots.
- Precise movement tracking through different city sectors during the separation process.

## Beat List
- BT001: The group arrives at the massive, sprawling city of Thark.
- BT002: Characters experience awe as they take in the grand architecture and scale of the city.
- BT003: Thark guards/officials begin processing the group based on status.
- BT004: John Carter is separated from the group and assigned quarters in a large building near the Central Plaza.
- BT005: Dejah Thoris is separated and remains under Thark supervision, establishing the emotional shift to isolation/dread.
